message:
chore: regenerate Cargo.lock for CI --locked compatibility

The previous partial `cargo update -p` produced a lock file that
passed --locked locally but failed on CI with a fresh crates.io
index. Regenerate from scratch to ensure full consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
